preamble: The voiced palatalized bilabial stop [bʲ] shifts to the voiceless palatalized counterpart [pʲ] through word-final devoicing in Slavic languages. This process affects all obstruents word-finally across Slavic consonant pairs, including palatalized stops.

examples.note: Word-final devoicing of palatalized voiced stops
Final position devoicing applying to soft consonants

related.label: Plain version of this devoicing process
